test-case.description: fails unknown collaborator role values by default
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.fails unknown collaborator role values by default

test-case.description: allows unmapped role values only when AllowUnknownRole is used
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.allows unmapped role values only when AllowUnknownRole is used

test-case.description: deduplicates identical CSV rows before attempting permission updates
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.deduplicates identical CSV rows before attempting permission updates

test-case.description: builds path-aware encoded item URLs from Path plus Item Name
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.builds path-aware encoded item URLs from Path plus Item Name

test-case.description: does not disconnect reused connections that were not created by this run
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.does not disconnect reused connections that were not created by this run

test-case.description: uses existing PNPConnection and processes items successfully
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.uses existing PNPConnection and processes items successfully

test-case.description: calls profile and identity-list wrapper functions in default library mode
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.calls profile and identity-list wrapper functions in default library mode

test-case.description: logs extracted profile properties before resolving personal site URL
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.logs extracted profile properties before resolving personal site URL

test-case.description: calls list discovery and property-load wrappers in auto-discover mode
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.calls list discovery and property-load wrappers in auto-discover mode

test-case.description: uses folder wrapper for folder items and still applies permissions
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.uses folder wrapper for folder items and still applies permissions

test-case.description: marks item as failed and continues when file or folder lookup throws
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.marks item as failed and continues when file or folder lookup throws

test-case.description: creates and disconnects both admin and personal connections when none exist
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.creates and disconnects both admin and personal connections when none exist

test-case.description: uses SharePointOnlineAdminUrl when creating the admin-scoped connection
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.uses SharePointOnlineAdminUrl when creating the admin-scoped connection

test-case.description: writes log lines through the logging helper during normal execution
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.writes log lines through the logging helper during normal execution

test-case.description: uses auto-discovered document library when AutoDiscoverDefaultLibrary is provided
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.uses auto-discovered document library when AutoDiscoverDefaultLibrary is provided

test-case.description: falls back to warning stream when log writes fail
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.falls back to warning stream when log writes fail

test-case.description: resolves personal site URL from PersonalSiteHostUrl and PersonalSpace when PersonalUrl is absent
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.resolves personal site URL from PersonalSiteHostUrl and PersonalSpace when PersonalUrl is absent

test-case.description: writes an error when personal site URL cannot be resolved from profile properties
test-case.name: Set-BoxToOneDriveItemPermission.ps1.writes an error when personal site URL cannot be resolved from profile properties
